title: Cohort learning-outcome trajectory assessment
description: This schema is deliberately cohort-level only. It excludes student names, IDs, or any individual learner fields so it supports curriculum decisions without student profiling.

outcome_trajectory_score.description: 100 is a strong improving cohort trajectory; 0 is a critically declining trajectory. Bands: 0-24 critical, 25-49 high, 50-74 moderate, 75-100 low.

trajectory_band.description: Risk band derived from the score: 75-100 low, 50-74 moderate, 25-49 high, 0-24 critical.

caveats.const: This output is LLM-reasoned, not a trained model prediction, and is associational rather than causal.
